testcase.name: test_16_public_categories_exist

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing expected category: Limitations assert 'Limitations' in ['Getting Started', 'Agent Anatomy', 'Tutorials', 'Platform Architecture', 'LLM Internals', 'Infrastructure', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration12_comprehensive.py:107: in test_16_public_categories_exist assert expected in found_names, f"Missing expected category: {expected}" E AssertionError: Missing expected category: Limitations E assert 'Limitations' in ['Getting Started', 'Agent Anatomy', 'Tutorials', 'Platform Architecture', 'LLM Internals', 'Infrastructure', ...]

testcase.name: test_agent_anatomy_documents_exist

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing Agent Anatomy doc: The Agent Loop assert 'The Agent Loop' in ['System Architecture Overview', 'What Is an AI Agent?', 'What Is an AI Agent Orchestrator?', 'The Subagent System', 'Tool Execution Engine', 'How Transformers Work', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration12_comprehensive.py:161: in test_agent_anatomy_documents_exist assert expected in found_titles, f"Missing Agent Anatomy doc: {expected}" E AssertionError: Missing Agent Anatomy doc: The Agent Loop E assert 'The Agent Loop' in ['System Architecture Overview', 'What Is an AI Agent?', 'What Is an AI Agent Orchestrator?', 'The Subagent System', 'Tool Execution Engine', 'How Transformers Work', ...]

testcase.name: test_tutorial_documents_exist

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing Tutorial doc: Cost Optimization assert 'Cost Optimization' in ['System Architecture Overview', 'What Is an AI Agent?', 'What Is an AI Agent Orchestrator?', 'The Subagent System', 'Tool Execution Engine', 'How Transformers Work', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration12_comprehensive.py:180: in test_tutorial_documents_exist assert expected in found_titles, f"Missing Tutorial doc: {expected}" E AssertionError: Missing Tutorial doc: Cost Optimization E assert 'Cost Optimization' in ['System Architecture Overview', 'What Is an AI Agent?', 'What Is an AI Agent Orchestrator?', 'The Subagent System', 'Tool Execution Engine', 'How Transformers Work', ...]
